title: Sleepy Princess in the Demon Castle
sourceNotes: Single season, 12 episodes. Manga ongoing (current ch. 445 as of July 2026, serialized in Weekly Shonen Sunday since 2016). Gag/vignette comedy format — the anime does not adapt chapters in sequence; individual episodes cherry-pick and reorder unrelated chapters (the finale alone draws from Ch. 33 and Ch. 84). Chapter ranges are approximate: the anime's 12 episodes loosely cover material through roughly Ch. 89 (through vol. 7) before the manga moves into territory the anime never touched.
